texture.detail_rendering: 각 요소(배경, 소스, 래디쉬 등)의 질감이 효과적으로 표현됨

improvement_notes: 고급스러운 느낌을 위해 조명을 더 부드럽게 하고, 배경 채도를 낮추거나 교체하여 음식에 집중시키며, 접시 전체가 보이는 안정적인 구도로 변경할 수 있음.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: A vibrant and energetic top-down food photograph of [YOUR FOOD HERE], artfully arranged on a rustic off-white ceramic plate. The background is a highly textured, bright magenta pink stucco wall. The lighting is a single, crisp, hard light from the top-left, creating high contrast and defined short shadows on the right. The color palette is super saturated, clean, and pop, in the style of Kodak Ektar 100 film. Shot with a 100mm macro lens, capturing extreme detail and texture with a shallow depth of field. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the plate cropped on the right side, leaving negative space on the left. --ar 4:5 --style raw --stylize 750
